stemHtml: You are flying with the autopilot climbing in vertical speed mode, what may happen?

options.a: Airspeed will decrease as the autopilot pitches up to keep the vertical speed.
options.b: Airspeed will decrease until the autopilot pitches down on approaching V<sub>S</sub> to prevent stall.
options.c: The autopilot disconnects before stall onset.
options.d: It is not possible to climb at a constant vertical speed.
